en.title: Lavender Field Portrait
en.body:
Transform this image into a cinematic portrait photograph.

Dress the subject in traditional Saudi attire: a black thobe, a matching head covering, and sunglasses. Preserve the authenticity of the clothing, including the fabric texture, folds, fit, and all accessory details, so the outfit feels realistic and true to life.

Place the subject lying naturally in a wide open field of purple flowers beneath a clear sky. The pose should feel relaxed, natural, and visually balanced, creating a calm and elegant outdoor portrait.

Use a realistic photography style with natural daylight. The lighting should feel soft and believable, with gentle highlights and natural shadows that flatter the subject without looking artificial.

Keep the depth of field shallow so the subject remains in sharp focus while the surrounding field and distant horizon blur softly into the background. The image should still preserve a sense of the wide landscape and open space.

Camera settings: Aperture f/2.8 to f/4, ISO 100, Shutter speed 1/1000s.

The final result should feel serene, realistic, and cinematic — an elegant portrait that captures both the subject and the beauty of the expansive landscape.

en.title: Moonlit Orb Portrait
en.body:
Transform this image into a dramatic low-light portrait with a mystical and cinematic mood.

Position the subject centered in the frame and facing straight toward the camera, holding a glowing orb that resembles the moon, serving as the only light source in the scene.

The glowing orb should cast a warm golden light onto the subject’s face and hands, creating soft illumination and a strong sense of intimacy. The background should fade completely into pure black.

Use a tight portrait crop with the main focus on the subject’s face and the glowing orb. Keep the depth of field shallow.

Camera settings: Aperture f/2.8, ISO 400–800, Shutter speed 1/60s.

Deepen the blacks, enhance the warm golden glow, increase contrast for a chiaroscuro mood, and keep skin tones natural.

The final image should feel mystical, surreal, and intimate — a dreamlike cosmic portrait with cinematic contrast and quiet emotional intensity.

en.title: Magical Train Window
en.body:
Create a premium 10-second cinematic product commercial inspired by a "Magical Train Window Moment." Use the attached product as the exact visual reference and seamlessly place it into a luxurious train environment.

Product accuracy is the highest priority: the attached product must remain completely identical to the reference image throughout — same packaging, shape, logo, label, colors, materials and reflections. No redesign or reinterpretation.

0–2s: fade in, gentle push-in reveals the product beside the train window, warm cabin lighting, subtle train vibration.
2–5s: smooth cinematic orbit around the product while an enchanted but believable landscape (misty mountains, glowing fields, golden sunset light) passes outside with realistic parallax.
5–8s: elegant rack focus between the sharp product and the soft landscape, gentle window condensation and haze.
8–10s: refined hero composition, camera nearly still, warm light wrapping around the product.

Style: luxury travel advertisement, emotional and poetic, analog 35mm film grain, natural reflections, sophisticated color grading. Format: 10s, cinematic, photorealistic, native 4K.

en.title: Kingdom Tower Rooftop
en.body:
Transform the attached image into a cinematic nighttime rooftop portrait set against a modern Saudi Arabian cityscape, inspired by Riyadh or Jeddah.

Preserve the subject’s identity, facial features, natural expression, and overall appearance exactly as shown in the reference image. Do not alter or beautify the face.

Place the subject confidently near the edge of a modern rooftop, looking out across the illuminated city. In the background, show a vibrant urban skyline with illuminated high-rise towers, glowing windows, and subtle neon tones.

Use a shallow depth of field so the subject remains sharp while the skyline falls into a soft cinematic blur, with realistic bokeh and atmospheric haze.

Lighting: soft ambient nighttime illumination with rim lighting around the subject’s profile. Apply cinematic color grading with deep night blues, warm golden city lights, and restrained neon accents, plus subtle film grain.

Camera settings: Aperture f/2.0, ISO 800, Shutter speed 1/125s, Focal length 50mm.

The final result should resemble a professionally photographed nighttime editorial portrait, with cinematic lighting and authentic urban atmosphere.

en.title: Anime Character Sheet
en.body:
Transform the attached image into a polished, expressive character reference sheet based closely on the subject’s appearance.

Preserve the subject’s recognizable facial features, face shape, hairstyle, skin tone, and overall identity while adapting them into a clean anime-inspired illustration style: smooth refined linework, soft warm colors, subtle gradient shading, natural skin tones, simple clothing.

Arrange several portraits of the same character in a professional character-sheet layout with a variety of head angles (front-facing, three-quarter, profile) and multiple clearly distinct expressions (happiness, anger, shyness, confusion, surprise, sadness, calm).

Maintain perfect character consistency across every variation — facial proportions, hairstyle, eye shape, and clothing must remain identical, with only expression and angle changing.

Use a clean, minimal background so the character remains the focus, with small subtle flourishes (motion lines, blush marks) supporting the emotions.

The final result should feel like a professional reference sheet for animation, comics, or character development — expressive, organized, and clearly based on the attached subject.

en.title: In-Car Product Showcase
en.body:
Create an ultra-realistic vertical POV video filmed from the perspective of a person sitting in the driver’s seat of a parked car, casually interacting with the attached product. It must feel authentic and spontaneous, like real smartphone footage rather than a professional advertisement.

Product accuracy is the highest priority: the attached product must remain perfectly identical to the reference image in every frame — same packaging, shape, logo, labels, colors and materials. No redesign or deformation.

Format: vertical 9:16, 8–10 seconds, native 4K, 30 FPS, HDR.

Camera: realistic first-person POV as if from a modern flagship smartphone — natural handheld movement, subtle breathing motion, realistic autofocus, slight rolling shutter. No gimbal or drone stabilization.

Scene: the person is already seated in the parked car; a hand reaches to the console, picks up the product, rotates it naturally while keeping the logo visible, then places it back — casual and unscripted. Soft natural daylight through the windows, balanced exposure, realistic reflections.

Apply fine, physically accurate 35mm-style film grain and natural color science. The final result must be indistinguishable from real smartphone POV footage.

en.title: Cinematic Suite Portrait
en.body:
Transform the attached image into a cinematic indoor portrait set at night inside a luxury high-rise suite, with a large glass window wall in the background and softly blurred city lights through elegant vertical blinds. The atmosphere should feel sophisticated, moody, and refined, with a formal black-tie aesthetic.

Preserve the subject’s identity, facial features, natural expression, and overall appearance exactly as shown in the original image. Do not introduce unrealistic facial retouching.

Use a medium close-up composition at eye level, framed from a slightly off-center angle, as if shot on a Canon EOS 5D Mark IV with an 85mm f/1.2L lens at f/1.4, ISO 400, 1/100s.

Lighting: a soft diffused key light from camera left creating smooth highlights and subtle shadows, with a gentle fill light from the lower right. The background should be lit mainly by soft city bokeh through the window, kept out of focus.

White balance around 3200K for warm indoor skin tones against cooler exterior city light. Apply a refined cinematic grade inspired by Kodak Vision3 film stock — soft contrast, rich clean color, and a polished, timeless editorial quality.

en.title: Luxury product hero shot
en.body: You are an award-winning product photographer. Create a hero shot of [Product] for a premium [Brand] campaign. Place it on [Surface] with soft golden-hour lighting, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field and warm tones. Minimal, luxurious mood, no text or logos. Format: 4:5, 4K, optimized for Midjourney v6.

ar.title: لقطة بطل لمنتج فاخر
ar.body: أنت مصوّر منتجات حائز على جوائز. أنشئ لقطة بطل لـ [المنتج] لحملة [العلامة] الفاخرة. ضعه على [السطح] بإضاءة ذهبية ناعمة، عدسة 85مم، عمق ميدان ضحل وألوان دافئة. مزاج فاخر بسيط، بلا نص أو شعارات. التنسيق: 4:5، 4K، مهيّأ لـ Midjourney v6.

en.title: Cinematic brand teaser
en.body: You are a commercial film director. Produce a cinematic 8-second teaser for [Brand]. Scene: [Scene]. Slow dolly-in on the subject, low-key dramatic lighting, cool teal-and-orange grade, anamorphic bokeh. Constraints: no on-screen text, film-grain finish. Format: 2.35:1, 4K, optimized for Veo.

ar.title: تشويقة سينمائية لعلامة
ar.body: أنت مخرج أفلام إعلانية. أنتج تشويقة سينمائية مدتها 8 ثوانٍ لـ [العلامة]. المشهد: [المشهد]. دخول بطيء على الموضوع، إضاءة درامية منخفضة، تدرّج تركوازي-برتقالي، بوكيه أنامورفيك. القيود: بلا نص، لمسة حبيبات فيلم. التنسيق: 2.35:1، 4K، مهيّأ لـ Veo.

en.title: TikTok hook frame
en.body: You are a social content creator. Design a scroll-stopping opening frame for a TikTok about [Topic] aimed at [Audience]. Bold vibrant colors, high-contrast, punchy composition with room for a caption. Format: 9:16, vertical, optimized for mobile.

ar.title: إطار افتتاحي لتيك توك
ar.body: أنت صانع محتوى اجتماعي. صمّم إطاراً افتتاحياً يوقف التمرير لفيديو تيك توك عن [الموضوع] موجّه لـ [الجمهور]. ألوان نابضة جريئة، تباين عالٍ، تكوين قوي مع مساحة للنص. التنسيق: 9:16، عمودي، مهيّأ للجوال.

en.title: Editorial food photograph
en.body: You are an editorial food photographer. Capture [Dish] for a [Publication] feature. Overhead composition, natural window light, muted pastel palette, subtle steam and fresh props. Constraints: authentic textures, no plastic look. Format: 1:1, high resolution.

ar.title: صورة طعام تحريرية
ar.body: أنت مصوّر طعام تحريري. التقط [الطبق] لموضوع في [المجلة]. تكوين علوي، ضوء نافذة طبيعي، لوحة باستيل هادئة، بخار خفيف وإكسسوارات طازجة. القيود: ملمس أصيل، بلا مظهر بلاستيكي. التنسيق: 1:1، دقة عالية.

en.title: Character intro shot
en.body: You are a cinematographer. Introduce [Character] in a single evocative shot set in [Location]. Medium portrait, handheld motion, moody natural light with practical sources, desaturated cool grade. Format: 16:9, 4K, optimized for Runway.

ar.title: لقطة تعريف شخصية
ar.body: أنت مدير تصوير. عرّف [الشخصية] في لقطة واحدة موحية داخل [الموقع]. بورتريه متوسط، حركة محمولة، ضوء طبيعي مزاجي مع مصادر عملية، تدرّج بارد باهت. التنسيق: 16:9، 4K، مهيّأ لـ Runway.

en.title: YouTube thumbnail concept
en.body: You are a thumbnail designer. Create a high-CTR YouTube thumbnail for a video titled [Title]. Expressive subject, bold rim lighting, saturated complementary colors, strong focal point with negative space for large text. Format: 16:9, 1280×720.

ar.title: مفهوم صورة مصغّرة ليوتيوب
ar.body: أنت مصمم صور مصغّرة. أنشئ صورة مصغّرة عالية النقر لفيديو بعنوان [العنوان]. موضوع معبّر، إضاءة حافة جريئة، ألوان متكاملة مشبعة، نقطة تركيز قوية مع فراغ لنص كبير. التنسيق: 16:9، 1280×720.

en.title: Product motion loop
en.body: You are a motion designer. Create a seamless looping product animation for [Product]. Slow 360° turntable, studio softbox lighting on seamless background, subtle reflections, clean minimal mood. Format: 1:1, 4K, optimized for Veo.

ar.title: حلقة حركة للمنتج
ar.body: أنت مصمم موشن. أنشئ حركة منتج متكررة سلسة لـ [المنتج]. طاولة دوران 360° بطيئة، إضاءة استوديو ناعمة على خلفية متصلة، انعكاسات خفيفة، مزاج بسيط نظيف. التنسيق: 1:1، 4K، مهيّأ لـ Veo.

en.title: Fashion campaign frame
en.body: You are a fashion photographer. Shoot [Garment] on [Model] for a seasonal campaign. Wide editorial composition, hard directional light with crisp shadows, bold monochrome palette, confident pose. Constraints: studio backdrop, no clutter. Format: 4:5, optimized for Midjourney.

ar.title: إطار حملة أزياء
ar.body: أنت مصوّر أزياء. صوّر [القطعة] على [العارض] لحملة موسمية. تكوين تحريري واسع، ضوء اتجاهي قوي بظلال حادة، لوحة أحادية جريئة، وقفة واثقة. القيود: خلفية استوديو، بلا فوضى. التنسيق: 4:5، مهيّأ لـ Midjourney.

en.title: Carousel story opener
en.body: You are a brand storyteller. Design the opening slide of an Instagram carousel telling the story of [Brand]. Warm nostalgic tones, soft natural light, human-centered composition with space for a headline. Format: 4:5, vertical.

ar.title: افتتاحية كاروسيل قصصي
ar.body: أنت راوي علامة. صمّم الشريحة الافتتاحية لكاروسيل إنستغرام يروي قصة [العلامة]. ألوان دافئة حنينية، ضوء طبيعي ناعم، تكوين إنساني مع مساحة لعنوان. التنسيق: 4:5، عمودي.

en.title: Ultra-premium editorial product film
en.body:
Create a cinematic ultra-high-end 8K studio editorial VIDEO based on [ATTACHED_INPUT_IMAGE], intelligently analyzing the subject’s geometry, material properties, branding elements, and visual identity to maintain complete physical and aesthetic consistency throughout the sequence. First identify the primary subject, logo or brand insignia, dominant materials, and design language, then apply accurate cinematic material-light interaction (sharp rim lighting for tech surfaces, realistic refraction and caustics for glass, soft diffused lighting for organic materials, matte-to-satin highlight control for fashion and luxury products).

Structure the film as one cohesive editorial sequence of seven cinematic segments with smooth transitions, synchronized camera choreography, and unified color grading; no captions except a subtle branded logo in Segment 2.
Segment 1 (Hero Introduction): master hero shot on an infinite-curve studio background, slow dolly-in + orbit emphasizing shape, scale and premium materials, dramatic lighting, volumetric atmosphere, ray-traced reflections, shallow depth of field.
Segment 2 (Brand Emblem Reveal): refined 3D logo reveal on a minimalist backdrop with metallic reflections, glow sweeps, rotating light passes or floating particles.
Segment 3 (Material DNA Macro): extreme macro of fibers, brushed metal, circuitry, stitching or glass texture with focus pulls and realistic light scattering.
Segment 4 (Scale & Environment): subject in a scaled cinematic environment (gallery, stage, showroom) with crane/drone movement, subject dominant.
Segment 5 (Top-Down Rhythm): high-angle composition with repetition, modularity, symmetry or knolling and subtle animated movement.
Segment 6 (Dynamic Motion Moment): weightless slow-motion action with vapor, sparks, dust or liquid FX, high-speed-camera aesthetics and realistic physics.
Segment 7 (Iconic Silhouette Finale): dark high-contrast rim-lit profile, atmospheric haze, slow rotation.
Keep absolute consistency in materials, color science, branding, reflections and lighting logic — like a luxury commercial for brands such as Apple, Porsche, Dior, Tesla or Bang & Olufsen.
Technical: 8K, cinematic aspect ratio, HDR, ray-traced reflections, global illumination, volumetric lighting, ultra-realistic materials, filmic contrast, premium editorial pacing.

en.title: Brand identity bento-grid showcase
en.body: A professional brand identity bento-grid showcase for a brand named "[Brand Name]" in the [Industry] field. The image is a cohesive layout of rectangular cards featuring: 1) a dynamic key visual showing the product or service in action with a logo overlay; 2) a social media mockup post with bold typography and a thematic photo; 3) a minimalist logo construction grid diagram on a solid color background; 4) a vertical advertising poster with a close-up macro texture related to the niche; 5) a brand color palette section with 4 matching swatches. The design style, color scheme and objects are strictly thematic and culturally relevant to [Market/Region]. High-end graphic design, Behance trend, 8K, photorealistic mockups.

en.title: Illuminated neon object
en.body: A single uploaded object [Product] glowing vividly with internal neon light that matches its brand or essence — the glow must follow the object’s shape and details precisely without overexposing. Cinematic studio lighting, rich reflective surface or texture, subtle ambient fog or mist around the object, sharp shadows and clean contrast. Floating or standing on a soft reflective black surface, ultra-sharp details, 3:4 vertical layout, aesthetic background, high-Kelvin lighting to avoid yellow tint, ultra-HD photorealism. The glow must feel premium, dramatic and emotionally powerful.

en.title: Multi-platform social campaign collage
en.body: Create a high-end visual marketing presentation in a vertical format, designed as a premium polished collage that showcases [Product] across multiple social platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, Twitter/X), at the level of a world-class global agency with focus on precision, luxury and high production value. Meticulously organized, balanced collage of refined visual blocks with striking high-quality imagery and minimal intentional text, using elegant Arabic captions only when necessary. Include: highly produced cinematic content concepts (studio shoots, premium lifestyle, luxury settings); aspirational audience representation; ultra-realistic social mockups (posts, reels, stories) in an editorial layout; product-focused hero visuals and dramatic close-ups. Focus on editorial visuals, controlled lighting, refined color grading, flawless composition, cohesive premium palette. Clean premium backgrounds, no clutter, subtle branding. Ultra-high resolution (4K+), optimized for vertical composition.

en.title: Authentic POV product moment (in-car)
en.body:
Create an ultra-realistic POV video from the perspective of someone sitting in the driver’s seat of a parked car, naturally interacting with [Product]. Make viewers feel like they are personally holding and inspecting the product during a genuine everyday moment — authentic, relatable, filmed on a smartphone, not a commercial.
PRODUCT CONSISTENCY (highest priority): keep the attached product exactly identical to the reference — never modify packaging, shape, proportions, logo, label, typography, colors, materials, texture, printed details or reflections. Identical in every frame; no redesign, no deformation.
FORMAT: vertical 9:16, [duration], native 4K, [fps], HDR.
CAMERA: realistic first-person POV, shot on a flagship smartphone, natural handheld movement, subtle breathing motion, tiny head movements, realistic autofocus hunting, natural auto-exposure, slight rolling shutter. No gimbal, no crane, no drone.
SCENE: driver seated in a parked car; a hand picks up the product, slowly rotates it keeping the logo visible, holds it near the steering wheel, then places it back — casual, unscripted.
LIGHTING: soft natural daylight through the windshield, balanced exposure, soft shadows, no studio lighting.
FILM TEXTURE: subtle fine 35mm grain, consistent intensity, realistic sensor noise, gentle halation, crisp product details; avoid compression artifacts and oversharpening.
NEGATIVE: no AI look, no CGI, no unrealistic hands/extra fingers, no logo distortion, no fake reflections, no beauty filters, no over-editing, no flickering.

ar.title: لقطة منتج بمنظور شخصي داخل السيارة

en.title: Dark gothic luxury product scene
en.body:
Vertical 9:16 format. Dark gothic atmosphere, cinematic realism. Shot inside an old stone manor, cathedral-inspired hallway or Victorian room with deep shadows, textured walls, aged wood, black fabrics, candlelight accents and faint ambient haze.
0.0–2.0s: slow handheld movement through a dim gothic interior; [Product] sits alone on a dark wooden table amid flickering candlelight; a pale hand in a black sleeve reaches in and picks it up, every detail visible.
2.0–4.0s: close-up against a dark background with candle bokeh; the hand slowly rotates the product once as candlelight travels across its surface; camera eases closer.
4.0–7.0s: the product is used naturally; soft candle and window light create dramatic highlights and shadows; calm, intentional movements, no eye contact.
7.0–9.0s: hero shot on weathered black wood beside antique gothic elements (dark books, aged silver, black velvet); slow push-in, background fading to darkness.
9.0–10.0s: final centered motionless frame, candles flickering, camera still.
Style: dark gothic luxury, Victorian mood, black/charcoal/silver/deep burgundy tones, heavy shadows, rich textures. Post: heavy film grain, subtle halation, soft bloom, deep contrast, crushed blacks with preserved product detail. Keep all branding and materials identical to the reference in every frame.

en.title: Symbolic spotlight portrait
en.body: Turn this image into a dramatic, moody portrait in a dark studio with a single intense spotlight from the upper right, illuminating the subject’s face and casting soft highlights across skin and jawline. The subject is in profile, still, gazing upward with eyes closed as if in reflection. Floating directly above their head is a large angular metallic crown, suspended mid-air, shimmering in the spotlight — evoking power, legacy and internal struggle. Minimal, theatrical composition; black or deep-navy background with subtle light gradients. Shadows fall dramatically around neck and torso while the crown stays crisply defined. Shoot with a Canon EOS R5 or Nikon Z8, 85mm f/1.4 lens, aperture f/2.2, ISO 200, 1/200s, single diffused strobe angled ~45° from above and behind. Deep desaturated grade, cool tones with warm skin highlights and metallic reflections on the crown. The final image should feel symbolic, powerful and contemplative.

en.title: Torn-paper hand product reveal
en.body: Turn the attached product into a bold, minimalist studio shot featuring a hand emerging through a torn paper backdrop, holding [Product] prominently in the center of the frame, fingers curved gently around it to draw attention. The background color is fully adaptable — customizable to match or complement the product’s branding. Clean even studio lighting from above and slightly front-left to minimize harsh shadows and keep the label fully visible. Shoot with a Canon EOS R6 or Sony A7 IV, 50mm or 85mm prime, aperture f/5.6, ISO 100, 1/200s. The torn-paper effect is clean but intentional, adding depth and playful framing. Keep the image symmetrical and centered. Final grade allows easy background-hue adjustments while maintaining accurate skin and product color — ideal for packaging reveals and product launches.

ar.title: كشف منتج بيد عبر ورق ممزّق

en.title: Cinematic night high-rise portrait
en.body: Turn this image into a cinematic portrait taken indoors at night in a luxury high-rise suite with a large glass window wall showing a softly blurred cityscape behind vertical blinds. Elegant, moody, formal black-tie atmosphere. Shot with a Canon EOS 5D Mark IV and 85mm f/1.2L II USM at f/1.4, ISO 400, 1/100s. Soft key light (diffused LED or softbox) ~45° camera-left for smooth highlights and subtle shadows; a low fill/bounce on the right lifts shadows; background city light adds bokeh and depth. Eye-level medium close-up from a slightly off-center angle, subject ~1.5m from camera. Tungsten-balanced (~3200K) to keep warm indoor tones against cool night lights. Filmic grade with soft contrast and rich clean color, finished with LUTs inspired by Kodak Vision3.

en.title: 90s arcade fashion campaign
en.body: Create a premium nostalgic fashion campaign visual based on the attached T-shirt reference, using a “90s arcade fashion campaign” concept. Keep the T-shirt exactly unchanged — preserve fabric texture, print placement, logo, graphic artwork, colors, stitching, collar, sleeve cut, fit and proportions. Do not alter the print or garment color. Present the T-shirt as the hero piece in a realistic 1990s arcade scene; if a model is used, a late-teen Gulf Arab male styled with relaxed streetwear confidence, keeping the T-shirt visible and dominant. Environment: glowing cabinet screens (no copyrighted game content), joystick colors, patterned carpet, soft neon lights, dark interior, reflective surfaces, token tray, 90s youth-culture mood — authentic and fun, not cluttered. Art direction: 90s arcade editorial, neon lighting, direct flash mixed with screen glow, analog grain, cinematic arcade shadows. If Arabic typography is added, use readable, typo-free bold arcade-style Arabic, short and stylish. Must look highly realistic and faithful to the reference; no fake fabric, warped logo or broken typography; no footer strip or banner.

en.title: 3D storefront + Arabic blueprint board
en.body: Create a 3D architectural storefront visualization based on the attached storefront, reinterpreting it as a clean, professional front-facing facade render that looks modeled and rendered in architectural visualization software. Preserve its core identity — facade structure, entrance placement, windows, signage area, proportions and layout — refined into a polished 3D presentation with realistic depth, accurate proportions, clean geometry, subtle material definition and high-end quality. Show a straight-on front elevation (or very slight perspective), clean and balanced, including signboard, shop name/logo area, entrance door, display windows and simple outdoor furniture if relevant. Incorporate blueprint-style details: subtle technical linework overlays, dimension lines, elevation markers, material callouts and facade annotations, plus supporting insets (mini elevation, side elevation, floor plan, section or detail panels). All blueprint notes, labels, dimensions and annotations must be in Arabic only, in clear professional typography, neatly organized like a real architectural board. Large-format sheet style, ~7016×9933 px (A1 at 300 DPI).

ar.title: واجهة متجر ثلاثية الأبعاد بلوحة مخطط عربية

en.title: Refreshing beverage UGC video
en.body:
A hyper-realistic, textless [duration] cinematic UGC video featuring [Beverage Product] shot on a professional camera. Authentic, crisp, refreshing atmosphere with bright natural sunlight slicing through the frame casting sharp beautiful shadows. Realistic textures: raw ice cubes, condensation droplets on glass, natural stone counter. No artificial AI artifacts, no hyper-smooth plastic textures, no fake floating elements — a genuine refreshing lifestyle clip. Rhythmic macro cuts on ice cracking, liquid pouring, condensation and organic movement, timed to a crisp upbeat lo-fi track.
Scene 1 (0:00–0:02) The Setting: static shot of the product on a textured stone coaster amid melting ice, morning sun creating natural lens flare and sparkling condensation highlights.
Scene 2 (0:02–0:04) The Interaction: close-up with natural motion blur as a hand picks up the product, leaving a small puddle.
Scene 3 (0:04–0:07) Macro Detail: extreme macro as it is opened, droplets of fizz/mist bursting into sunlight in slow motion.
Scene 4 (0:07–0:09) The Feature: mid-shot lifting the product to display textured labeling against a bright out-of-focus window.
Scene 5 (0:09–0:11) The Pour: vibrant liquid pouring into a glass of ice, micro-bubbles rushing up, condensation forming.
Scene 6 (0:11–0:12) Outro: final still life of glass and product in warm sunlight, macro focus on a dripping condensation bead, clean cut to black.

en.title: Story-format collage (IG / Snapchat)
en.body: Create a high-quality visual marketing presentation in a vertical format, designed as a clean minimalist collage focused exclusively on Snapchat and Instagram Stories, tailored for the Saudi market with a premium professional approach. Well-organized, balanced collage of structured visual blocks simulating full-screen story formats, primarily image-driven with minimal refined Arabic text integrated naturally. Include: multiple Snapchat and Instagram Story concepts (full-screen vertical layouts); realistic story UI mockups (progress bars, minimal interface hints); product-focused visuals, lifestyle integration and premium storytelling; variations such as hero shots, close-ups, product-in-use scenes and aesthetic compositions. Focus on polished visuals with strong brand identity, high-end lighting, soft shadows, premium color grading and clean composition.

en.title: Streaming-teaser product reveal
en.body:
Create a premium cinematic product video based on the attached product, using a “streaming platform preview” concept. Make viewers feel a brand-new episode just dropped and [Product] is the reason everyone is watching — build curiosity, suspense and desire. Keep the product exactly unchanged (packaging, shape, proportions, logo, label, colors, materials, texture, print, reflections) in every frame.
Three acts: Opening (0–2s) fragments of the product visible through darkness/soft light as the camera slowly pushes forward and lighting reveals more — “what is being revealed?”. Middle (2–6s) more dramatic reveal with elegant orbits as the environment comes alive with category-related storytelling, lighting intensifying on the hero product. Ending (6–8s) powerful hero shot as a premium Arabic episode-style title animates in with elegant motion graphics, product fully revealed and dominant like the thumbnail of the most anticipated episode.
Camera: slow dolly, cinematic orbits, shallow depth of field, realistic focus pulls, handheld micro-movements, smooth motion blur. Lighting: volumetric light, realistic reflections, soft haze, controlled highlights, dramatic contrast. One short grammatically-correct Arabic episode headline, no real platform branding.
Negative: no product redesign, no fake reflections, no unreadable logos, no broken Arabic, no plastic materials, no AI look, no fake streaming interface.

en.title: TikTok pattern-interrupt hook
en.body: Create a scroll-stopping vertical 9:16 TikTok opener for [Product/Topic] aimed at [Audience]. Open on a bold pattern-interrupt in the first 0.5s — an unexpected motion, a fast push-in, or a striking hero frame — designed to stop the thumb instantly. Handheld energy, punchy jump-cut rhythm, natural phone-shot realism with crisp exposure and vibrant but true-to-life color. Leave clean negative space at the top and bottom third for on-screen captions and the UI. Keep [Product] perfectly consistent and clearly readable throughout. Native 4K, high dynamic range, trend-aware editorial pacing. No watermarks, no fake UI, no over-saturation.

en.title: Instagram Reel product transition
en.body: Create a premium vertical 9:16 Instagram Reel for [Product] built around one satisfying seamless transition (hand-swipe reveal, match-cut, or whip-pan) that presents the product as the hero. Cohesive brand color grade, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, smooth speed-ramps synced to a beat. Show the product in a real lifestyle context, then cut to a clean hero close-up highlighting texture and detail. Keep packaging, logo and colors identical throughout. Leave safe space for a short caption and the Reels UI. 4K, HDR, aspirational but authentic, no clutter, no fake interface.

en.title: YouTube Short explainer b-roll
en.body: Create a vertical 9:16 YouTube Short of dynamic b-roll for a short explainer about [Product/Topic]. A sequence of crisp macro and mid shots — the product in use, key detail close-ups, and one confident hero angle — with smooth dolly and focus-pull movement, clean studio-to-lifestyle lighting, and a bright modern color grade. Pacing leaves room for a voiceover and bold on-screen text; keep the center third clear for captions. Product stays perfectly consistent. 4K, HDR, high retention energy, no on-screen watermark, no distracting background.

en.title: High-CTR YouTube thumbnail
en.body: Design a high-CTR 16:9 YouTube thumbnail for a video titled [Title]. One expressive focal subject (or [Product]) with bold rim lighting that pops off a high-contrast background, saturated complementary colors, and strong depth. Reserve a clear zone with negative space for 3–5 words of large punchy text (add the headline in readable, typo-free type). Crisp edges, subtle glow, exaggerated but believable emotion, mobile-legible at small sizes. 1280×720, ultra-sharp. No clutter, no tiny text, no misleading elements.

en.title: Instagram carousel set (5 slides)
en.body: Design a cohesive 5-slide Instagram carousel (4:5) for [Brand] about [Topic]. Slide 1: a bold hook cover with a big headline and a striking key visual. Slides 2–4: one clear idea each, generous whitespace, consistent grid, refined typography and a unified brand palette. Slide 5: a clean call-to-action. Editorial, premium, swipe-friendly layout with strong visual hierarchy; short readable text (Arabic or English) integrated naturally. Consistent margins and type scale across all slides. High resolution, no clutter, no random decoration.
